title: astragalus camelorum
intro: Astragalus camelorum, also known as Camel's Throat or Tang Kuei, is a plant species within the legume family native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This perennial herb is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body resist stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus camelorum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. In herbal preparations, Astragalus camelorum is commonly combined with other herbs, dried or processed into capsules or teas, and used to support vitality, reduce symptoms of menopause, and promote overall health and resilience.
